# File Examples

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-file
kind: File
spec:
  action: download
  source:
    url: https://example.invalid/file.tar.gz
  output:
    path: files/example.tar.gz
```

## Curated Example

```yaml
kind: File
spec:
  action: copy
  src: /etc/kubernetes/admin.conf
  dest: /home/vagrant/.kube/config
  owner: vagrant
  group: vagrant
  mode: "0644"
```
